message:
refactor: Move build artifacts to zig-out/ directory

- Update bench script cleanup comment (files now in zig-out/)
- Update gitignore for zig-out/ paths

All generated files (bundle_compiled.c, frozen_functions.c, etc.)
now use zig-out/ directory, keeping repo root clean.

files.patch:
@@ -65,8 +65,11 @@ vendor/*
 /test_*.js.env
 .env
 *.o
-frozen_functions.c
 frozen_manifest.json
 bundle_original.c
 .repl_history
+
+# Generated build files (now in zig-out/, but kept here for backwards compatibility)
+bundle_compiled.c
+frozen_functions.c
 claude_bundle_compiled.c

@@ -66,7 +66,7 @@ build_bench() {
         cd "$ROOT_DIR" && "$EDGEBOXC" build "$js_file" 2>&1 | grep -v "^\[" | grep -v "^  Atom" || true
         [ -f "$ROOT_DIR/$name.wasm" ] && mv "$ROOT_DIR/$name.wasm" "$wasm_file"
         [ -f "$ROOT_DIR/$name.aot" ] && mv "$ROOT_DIR/$name.aot" "$aot_file"
-        rm -f "$ROOT_DIR"/bundle*.{js,c} "$ROOT_DIR"/frozen_*.{c,json} 2>/dev/null
+        # Files now in zig-out/ which is auto-cleaned by build system
     fi
 }
